description: Typed characters are doble echoed. Also, the striped line represents a problem detailed in the console log.
regression_tests: terminal_client/test/widget_test_ui.dart::wires terminal text input changes/submission to key events
root_cause: Server readTerminalOutput called AppendOutput after ReadAvailable had already appended, doubling PTY echo bytes in live.output — causing heellpp output for help input. Secondary symptom (striped overflow line) was a RenderFlex overflow at 286px screen height (browser with keyboard raised) that was incidental to the double-output state.
notes: Platform macOS:web; screen height only 286px at time of filing (likely browser keyboard open). DDC loader messages in description are normal Flutter web output, not errors.
